items.summary: Investigate and fix the bug causing session creation to fail with the error 'Failed to create a session'. Trace the full session creation flow from the CreateSession page through the backend createSession call. Ensure that submitting a valid court count successfully creates and persists the session in the backend, stores the session info in local storage, returns a valid session code, and navigates the host to the HostSessionDashboard without error. Handle both authenticated and guest (anonymous) actor cases.
